title: 8/27/20 Gunna do Atlantis for a week

transcript.text: Yes, I'm living in Boulder Vlog. I think it's 27th of August. It's 1.30 in the p.m.
So yesterday was like my first day that I got totally obsessed working for my new Atlantis video.
The problem is I wasn't actually done with my Google Earthing of Atlantis and the Google Earthing.
And so in order to make a good video, which I really want to do, I have to finish the Google Earth of the Atlantis.
But in order to do that, that constitutes as working on my website. Anything Google Earth means website.
And I promised myself that I wasn't going to work on my website.
So now I'm in this quandary. I'm in this catch-22. Like, what do I do? Relapse?
But I was 100% sure I was never going to relapse.
But I also really need to make that video. Like, that's my number one desire in life right now.
So, um, maybe what I could do is relapse for a week.
And then if I don't finish the Google Earth of the...
Because I don't think it's that much more work, actually.
I think I'm pretty much done.
You know, I mean, there's lots of...
There's a few things I can do.
I mean, I could add the, um, the, uh, citizens to the island.
Because he said that there was something like, uh, a thousand farms on the island or something like that.
No, no, it was 60,000 farms.
But, you know, to create 60,000 farms on an island, um, that's going to take a while.
That's, like, not a short, a short, that's not a short project.
So maybe I should just do that later on the video and skip that over.
I think I'll skip that over.
I was thinking about, uh, uh, uh, uh, in order to make the 60,000 farms.
I mean, it doesn't have to be that time.
Because what you could do is, I already have my main, I think it's 1,500-meter-long canal.
And then I have the half canals, which he described.
But the canals that I have there are exactly what Plato described.
And I'll explain how that is.
But, um, but if I'm going to do the 60,000, I would have to line all of those.
And then, to make a grid.
But that's a lot of little lines.
And then I have to, you know, and then if that's not enough, you could kind of pretty easily, I guess,
Increase the numbers pretty quickly by, you just add roads.
And then you add a line on the other side of that.
But even though, you know, 60,000, that's kind of like a lot.
So, I don't know.
I mean, yeah, it's not worth doing it now.
Or else that would be, definitely would be a relapse.
So, hey.
I, um, yeah, I'm just going to do the video.
There's one thing that I have to do with the Google Earth.
And that's, um, that's the distances.
I'm incorporating, um, cycling into it.
With all the distances with cycling.
Because I'm going to tie, I want to tie everything that I'm building together.
So that in the future, I can reference it all together.
And connect it all.
And with the links, whenever I'm talking about.
So, uh, I had to, um, create.
I was creating video yesterday.
I was learning, um, Premiere Pro with all, and doing all of the, um, sound edits.
Luckily, uh, you can do all of the sound edits with Premiere Pro.
Now, a year ago, you couldn't.
You had to go buy.
I had to spend, like, a hundred bucks.
I had to buy two different programs to do, um, background noise deletion as well as.
And then another one that did, like, noise.
